name: [BUG-007] Cards do not support tags or labels
description:
Expected: POST /api/boards/{id}/cards accepts 'tags' (list of strings) and returns them.
        Actual:   'tags' field is silently ignored — no labeling system exists.
descriptionHtml:
Expected: POST /api/boards/{id}/cards accepts 'tags' (list of strings) and returns them.
    Actual:   'tags' field is silently ignored — no labeling system exists.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-007: Card has no tag/label field

AssertionError: Tags/labels field not supported — cannot categorize cards
assert ('tags' in {'board_id': 3, 'column': 'Backlog', 'created_at': '2026-05-18T08:54:31.217270', 'creator_id': 2, ...})

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-007: Card has no tag/label field')

tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-007: Card has no tag/label field')
